headline: Russian State Hackers Weaponize Home Routers to Harvest Enterprise Credentials
summary: APT28 (Fancy Bear) compromised thousands of residential routers to intercept passwords and authentication tokens, targeting remote workers accessing corporate systems from home networks. This represents a shift in nation-state tactics — bypassing hardened enterprise perimeters by attacking the weakest link in the hybrid-work chain. The strategic implication: perimeter security is irrelevant when the endpoint connecting to your cloud is already owned.
oci_implication: OCI should assess whether this vector is being exploited against customers using OCI remote access or VPN-adjacent services, and consider it a product signal to accelerate zero-trust and continuous authentication capabilities as a differentiator against AWS and Azure — both of whom face the same exposure.
